dtcs.description: G Sensor Circuit Failure (4WD Model) For vehicle equipped with ESP, go to DTC C1015 / C1017 / C1023: Longitudinal G Sensor / Lateral G Sensor / Yaw Rate Sensor in Yaw Rate / G Sensor Assembly Failure. If the signal voltage of G sensor while at a stop does not vary from that while running, this DTC is set. (for 4WD vehicle) Therefore, this DTC may be set when a vehicle is lifted up and its wheel(s) is turned. In such case, clear the DTC and check again.

steps.instruction: Check for proper connection from harness to control module.
If OK, substitute an ABS hydraulic unit/control module assembly with correct part number.

dtcs.description: Brake Light Switch Circuit Failure Step 1-5 Step 5
Brake Fluid Level Switch Failure Step 1-6
Master Cylinder Pressure Sensor Power Supply Failure

steps.instruction: Turn ignition switch to OFF position.
Check for proper connection from harness to ESP(R) control module.
If OK, substitute an ESP(R) hydraulic unit / control module assembly with correct part number.

Transfer Switch Circuit Open

steps.instruction: Select transfer switch to "4H" position and keep its position for 10 seconds. Similarly select transfer switch to "4H-lock", "N" and "4L-lock" position.

dtcs.description: Transfer Switch Circuit Short

steps.instruction: Select transfer switch to "4H" position and keep its position for 10 seconds. Similarly select transfer switch to "4H-lock", "N" and "4L-lock" position.

dtcs.description: Transfer Shift Actuator Motor Position Switch 1 Circuit Open / Transfer Shift Actuator Motor Position Switch 2 Circuit Open

steps.instruction: Select transfer switch to "4H" position and keep its position for 10 seconds. Similarly select transfer switch to "4H-lock", "N" and "4L-lock" position.

dtcs.description: Transfer Shift Actuator Motor Position Switch 1 Circuit Short / Transfer Shift Actuator Motor Position Switch 2 Circuit Short

steps.instruction: Select transfer switch to "4H" position and keep its position for 10 seconds. Similarly select transfer switch to "4H-lock", "N" and "4L-lock" position.

dtcs.description: 4L/N Switch Circuit Open

steps.instruction: Select transfer switch to "4L-lock" position and keep its position for 1 min.

dtcs.description: 4L/N Switch Circuit Short

steps.instruction: Select transfer switch to "4L-lock" position and keep its position for 1 min.

dtcs.description: Transfer Actuator Circuit Malfunction

steps.instruction: Select transfer switch to "4H" position and keep its position for 10 seconds. Similarly select transfer switch to "4H-lock", "N" and "4L-lock" position.

dtcs.description: Center Differential Lock Switch Circuit Open

steps.instruction: Select transfer switch to "4H" position and keep its position for 1 min.

dtcs.description: Center Differential Lock Switch Circuit Short

steps.instruction: Select transfer switch to "4L-lock" position and keep its position for 1 min.

dtcs.description: 4WD Control Module Power Supply Circuit Malfunction

steps.instruction: Start engine and drive vehicle at 30 km/h (19 mph) or more vehicle speed at least for 1 min.
Stop vehicle and check DTC. Step 1-2

dtcs.description: Internal Circuit Malfunction of 4WD Control Module

steps.instruction: Turn ignition switch to ON position for 60 seconds.
Check DTC. Substitute a known-good 4WD control module and recheck.

dtcs.description: Clutch Pedal Position (CPP) Switch Circuit Short

steps.instruction: Start engine and drive vehicle at 50 km/h (31 mile/h) or more vehicle speed at least for 1 min.
Stop vehicle and check DTC. Step 1-4
